# Databricks Consumption Pricing (DBU Model)

Databricks bills in DBUs (Databricks Units) — a normalized compute-hour unit.
DBU rate varies by workload tier (Jobs, All-Purpose, SQL) and cloud.

## Questions Answered
- What is the unit of consumption billing?
- Why does the same VM cost different DBU rates across workload tiers?

## Questions Raised
- How predictable is monthly spend for spiky agentic workloads?
